name: 完形填空
subject: english
curriculum_points: 能运用一定的阅读策略，借助表格、思维导图等工具梳理书面语篇的主要信息，理解大意。
在阅读稍长的语篇材料时，能理解主要内容，推断隐含信息，表达个人看法，提出合理疑问，分析和解决问题。
能借助基本的构词法知识推测语篇中生词的含义，辅助理解语篇内容。

deep_snippets.text: Cambridge Primary English 0844 Curriculum Framework. Introduction The Cambridge Primary English Curriculum Framework promotes an enquiry-based approach to learning to develop learners’ confidence, creativity and intellectual engagement. It is designed for learners who have English as a first language and can be used in any cultural context. The curriculum framework provides a comprehensive set of progressive learning objectives for English. The learning objectives detail what a learner should know, understand and be able to do in each year of primary education. The Cambridge Primary English Curriculum Framework provides a solid foundation from which learners can work towards study at Cambridge Lower Secondary. Divided into six stages, the curriculum framework covers knowledge, skills and understanding in the three strands, Reading, Writing and Speaking and listening. Within Reading and Writing, learning objectives are grouped in sub-strands which have a direct relationship with the reporting sub-strands of the Checkpoint tests, allowing teachers to link feedback from the tests to teaching. Where applicable, in each sub-strand, learning objectives that relate to only fiction are placed before those relating to non-fiction. Facilitating skills that have broad application within Reading and Writing are included as learning objectives in the sub-strands Develop broad reading skills and Develop broad writing skills. These skills are best assessed through teacher-, peer- and self-assessment and are not directly assessed in the Checkpoint tests. The world-class Cambridge Primary C

Cambridge Lower Secondary English 1111 Curriculum Framework. Introduction The Cambridge Lower Secondary English Curriculum Framework promotes an enquiry-based approach to learning to develop learners’ confidence, creativity and intellectual engagement. It is designed for learners who have English as a first language and can be used in any cultural context. The curriculum framework provides a comprehensive set of progressive learning objectives for English. The learning objectives detail what a learner should know, understand and be able to do in each year of lower secondary education. The Cambridge Lower Secondary English Curriculum Framework builds on the Primary curriculum framework and provides a solid foundation from which learners can work towards study at Cambridge Upper Secondary. Divided into three stages, the curriculum framework covers knowledge, skills and understanding in the three strands, Reading, Writing and Speaking and listening. Within Reading and Writing, learning objectives are grouped in sub-strands which have a direct relationship with the reporting sub-strands of the Checkpoint tests, allowing teachers to link feedback from the tests to teaching. Where applicable, in each sub-strand, learning objectives that relate to only fiction are placed before those relating to non- fiction. Facilitating skills that have broad application within Reading and Writing are included as learning objectives in the sub-strands Develop broad reading skills and Develop broad writing skills. These skills are best assessed through teacher-, peer- and self-assessment and are

supplements.curriculum_md_raw:
# 完形填空

## 基本信息
- **学科**: 英语
- **学段**: middle
- **年级**: 8
- **章节/领域**: 语篇理解与书面表达
- **内容来源**: TeachAny 课标知识点卫星文件

## 一、课标原文

### 1.1 内容要求
> 能运用一定的阅读策略，借助表格、思维导图等工具梳理书面语篇的主要信息，理解大意。
> 在阅读稍长的语篇材料时，能理解主要内容，推断隐含信息，表达个人看法，提出合理疑问，分析和解决问题。
> 能借助基本的构词法知识推测语篇中生词的含义，辅助理解语篇内容。

## 二、教学目标

- 理解「完形填空」的核心概念、方法与应用场景。
- 能结合材料、问题或真实情境解释「完形填空」相关现象。
- 能用规范的学科语言表达思路、依据和结论。

## 三、教学重难点

- 教学重点：建立对「完形填空」核心概念和基本方法的准确理解。
- 教学难点：把知识迁移到新的问题、材料或真实情境中。

## 五、教学建议

### 5.1 教学方法
- 以真实语境和交际任务组织「完形填空」教学，落实形式、意义、使用统一。
- 通过听说读写综合活动，让学生先理解语境，再操练语言形式，最后完成表达任务。
- 围绕课标要点“能运用一定的阅读策略，借助表格、思维导图等工具梳理书面语篇的主要信息，理解大意。”，设计输入理解、控制操练和真实输出任务。

### 5.2 学习活动设计
1. 以真实语境和交际任务组织「完形填空」教学，落实形式、意义、使用统一。
2. 通过听说读写综合活动，让学生先理解语境，再操练语言形式，最后完成表达任务。
3. 围绕课标要点“能运用一定的阅读策略，借助表格、思维导图等工具梳理书面语篇的主要信息，理解大意。”，设计输入理解、控制操练和真实输出任务。

## 七、课件制作参考

- 以真实语境和交际任务组织「完形填空」教学，落实形式、意义、使用统一。
- 通过听说读写综合活动，让学生先理解语境，再操练语言形式，最后完成表达任务。
- 围绕课标要点“能运用一定的阅读策略，借助表格、思维导图等工具梳理书面语篇的主要信息，理解大意。”，设计输入理解、控制操练和真实输出任务。

## 八、相关知识扩展

- 联系生活话题、跨文化语境和项目任务，拓展「完形填空」的真实使用场景。
- 通过角色扮演、信息差任务、短文写作或口头展示提高语言迁移能力。
supplements.textbook_summary:
## 教材化讲解参考（由课标要点生成）

### 核心概念
完形填空是英语学习中的重要知识点。教学时应围绕课标要点“能运用一定的阅读策略，借助表格、思维导图等工具梳理书面语篇的主要信息，理解大意。”展开，先明确概念边界，再通过例子、图示、实验、语篇或案例帮助学生建立可迁移的理解。

### 学习路径
1. 情境导入：以真实语境和交际任务组织「完形填空」教学，落实形式、意义、使用统一。
2. 探究建构：通过听说读写综合活动，让学生先理解语境，再操练语言形式，最后完成表达任务。
3. 应用迁移：围绕课标要点“能运用一定的阅读策略，借助表格、思维导图等工具梳理书面语篇的主要信息，理解大意。”，设计输入理解、控制操练和真实输出任务。

### 例题设计方向
可设计一道“识别核心概念”的基础题，一道“解释现象或文本材料”的理解题，一道“迁移到真实情境”的应用题，并要求学生说明依据。

deep_textbook_snippets.text: Cambridge Primary English 0844 Curriculum Framework. Introduction The Cambridge Primary English Curriculum Framework promotes an enquiry-based approach to learning to develop learners’ confidence, creativity and intellectual engagement. It is designed for learners who have English as a first language and can be used in any cultural context. The curriculum framework provides a comprehensive set of progressive learning objectives for English. The learning objectives detail what a learner should know, understand and be able to do in each year of primary education. The Cambridge Primary English Curriculum Framework provides a solid foundation from which learners can work towards study at Cambridge Lower Secondary. Divided into six stages, the curriculum framework covers knowledge, skills and understanding in the three strands, Reading, Writing and Speaking and listening. Within Reading and Writing, learning objectives are grouped in sub-strands which have a direct relationship with the reporting sub-strands of the Checkpoint tests, allowing teachers to link feedback from the tests to teaching. Where applicable, in each sub-strand, learning objectives that relate to only fiction are placed before those relating to non-fiction. Facilitating skills that have broad application within Reading and Writing are included as learning objectives in the sub-strands Develop broad reading skills and Develop broad writing skills. These skills are best assessed through teacher-, peer- and self-assessment and are not directly assessed in the Checkpoint tests. The world-class Cambridge Primary C

The learning objectives detail what a learner should know, understand and be able to do in each year of lower secondary education. The Cambridge Lower Secondary English Curriculum Framework builds on the Primary curriculum framework and provides a solid foundation from which learners can work towards study at Cambridge Upper Secondary. Divided into three stages, the curriculum framework covers knowledge, skills and understanding in the three strands, Reading, Writing and Speaking and listening. Where applicable, in each sub-strand, learning objectives that relate to only fiction are placed before those relating to non- fiction. Facilitating skills that have broad application within Reading and Writing are included as learning objectives in the sub-strands Develop broad reading skills and Develop broad writing skills. errors.description: 学习「完形填空」时只记形式，不能在真实语境中表达意义。
受中文表达影响，忽略英语词序、搭配或语法一致性。

exercises.stem: Create two sentences in a real context to show how to use 完形填空. Explain the meaning in Chinese.
exercises.answer: Sentences should fit the context and reflect: 能运用一定的阅读策略，借助表格、思维导图等工具梳理书面语篇的主要信息，理解大意。

exercises.stem: Read a short dialogue and identify how 完形填空 helps express meaning.
exercises.answer: The answer should explain form, meaning and use in context.

real_world: 围绕校园、家庭、兴趣、出行或节日话题，在真实交流中使用「完形填空」。
